name: stackra/staff
purpose: Employed/engaged personnel — Staff wraps a User row with employment metadata, and Coach adds a per-sport coaching profile satellite.
capabilities: Staff Eloquent model (stf_...) wrapping a User
Coach satellite (coa_...) adding a per-sport profile
when_to_use: Modelling employees or contractors of a tenant — the authenticated actors that run the business.
when_not_to_use: For end-customers (athletes, members, students), use the domain aggregates in sports and sibling domain packages.
